title: Sane Defaults QoL
description: A Vanilla QoL Pack with default settings that just make sense so that you don't have to spend time setting 5 billion settings.
body: A Vanilla QoL Pack with default settings that just make sense so that you don't have to spend time setting 5 billion settings. It uses Vulkan in place of Sodium for better performance as well as adding features like fly-speed and better block placement for creative mode. Mods are configured for a pure vanilla experience but you can easily do things like remove fog or enable connected textures.
